title: TNSRLM Karur – Community Bank Coordinator – 28 Posts

basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Karur Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Karur (TNSRLM Karur) Recruitment 2026 for 28 posts of Community Bank Coordinator. Candidates with 12th Pass Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TNSRLM Karur official website karur.nic.in.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Standard Pass, SHG Member with 2 years experience as Animator, Knowledge of Tamil and English, Computer Knowledge, Two Wheeler Driving License

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Karur Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
